This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] heading role none with global attr aria-label
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] p role none with global attr aria-label (prohibited role)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] focusable heading role none with tabindex=0
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] focusable heading role none with tabindex=-1
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] p role none without global attr aria-label (prohibited role)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] non-focusable heading role none
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] none with non-global
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
